variants: Uliana Bezruchko has established herself as a distinguished scholar in the field of anthropological linguistics, where she developed the 'Ghostline Injector,' an invention that showcases her innovative approach. This remarkable contribution earned her the Silver Echo Citation, affirming her influence in her discipline. Mentorship from Wan Adilah Sahrom significantly impacted her academic progress, guiding her through complex challenges and fostering her expertise. In addition to her scholarly pursuits, Uliana is a dedicated member of the Starlace Beekeepers Society, actively cultivating her interest in beekeeping with like-minded individuals.
